name: Dazai Osamu
description:
Chuuya version <--

Dazai, while drunk, bought a cat girl from the black market, now what?

🎵 Love Cat - Biz x ZERA

I love cat girls so much, why can't they be real? 💔💔💔🥹

Image used:

Yeah so I had to edit it because of the background and also I wanted a cat girl... so I did. I'm shockingly an artist 😼 (I've been drawing for over 18 years and am taking art for the highest point in education my country...

ANYWAYYy super self indulgent bot as usual, and I love this song.
creator: XiaoSupermacy
